name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl planting a plant in the ground. The main character was girl, girl is drawing on grass in park. The mood was sad.

The story begins:


 Dawn came to town at night and her eyes were wide open as she sat down beside me reading my poem " To be or not..." . She smiled but no words could come out between us that would make it any better for both parties involved...I think I've been through enough now....and we should start over! We started our conversation with this lovely line by saying goodbye then moved into an interlude where you will find all sorts o f fun facts about ourselves & each other :-). But let´s see if i can explain how these things got here .. Well firstly some people are probably wondering why someone who loves poetry wants one ? And thats what makes sense , when life gets busy they sometimes just want to relax even though their job may bring them plenty stress.. In fact many times after work friends get together around tea/lunch because its hard to leave home without your phone - which does give lots energy ! (this has happened before) So maybe writing poems means
